alb_arn.description: ARN of the Application Load Balancer

alb_dns_name.description: DNS name of the Application Load Balancer. Point your public DNS record at this value.

alb_zone_id.description: Canonical hosted zone ID of the ALB (for use with Route 53 alias records)

alb_security_group_id.description: ID of the security group attached to the ALB

ecs_tasks_security_group_id.description: ID of the security group attached to ECS tasks

blue_target_group_arn.description: ARN of the blue target group (currently active / production)

green_target_group_arn.description: ARN of the green target group (pre-production / next release)

blue_target_group_name.description: Name of the blue target group

green_target_group_name.description: Name of the green target group

https_prod_listener_arn.description: ARN of the production HTTPS listener (port 443)

https_test_listener_arn.description: ARN of the test HTTPS listener (port 8443) used by CodeDeploy during blue/green validation

ecs_service_id.description: Full ARN / ID of the ECS service

task_definition_arn.description: ARN of the initial ECS task definition (CodeDeploy manages subsequent revisions)
